# The Wheaton Group, LLC

> Talent acquisition and recruiting firm specializing in direct placement (90-day guarantee, success-based pricing) and hourly contract recruiting, with 15+ years of experience serving the federal sector and professional services firms.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.wheaton-group.com/): Overview of services and value proposition
- [About](https://www.wheaton-group.com/about): Mission and leadership, led by William Hwang, Principal
- [Services](https://www.wheaton-group.com/services): Direct placement and contract recruiting, compared in depth
- [Employers](https://www.wheaton-group.com/employers): How the four-step hiring process works
- [Careers](https://www.wheaton-group.com/careers): Open roles placed through The Wheaton Group
- [Contact](https://www.wheaton-group.com/contact): Contact form, email, and phone

## Contact
